mapper.select:
SELECT
receipt_id AS receiptId, maintenance_id AS maintenanceId, file_name AS fileName, file_path AS filePath, upload_date AS uploadDate
FROM "Receipts"
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO "Receipts" ( maintenance_id, file_name, file_path, upload_date )
VALUES ( #{maintenanceId}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{uploadDate} )
